title: linaria peltieri
intro: Linaria peltieri, also known as Toadflax or Peltier's Linaria, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Linaria peltieri include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs, and even acting as an anthelmintic to expel intestinal worms. Herbal preparations of Linaria peltieri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
